creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
DIN Is Noise has been updated from version 30 to version 35.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building din-35.

The patch can be found here

https://github.com/fraggerfox/din-port/commit/1d8ae025825971ef00c6ae02d4a7f6577f1590b4

It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
